response.original_title: 社長夫人が倒産で一気に風俗堕ち 主人がこき使った下請企業の社員たちに知られ中出し20発の違法サービスを強要された
response.overview: Nanase Alice, the young wife of the CEO of a venture company, thought her life would continue like this forever . Her husband's company was thriving and incredibly successful.  Every weekend she would drive a luxury car, carry an expensive bag, and eat high-end sushi... But then her husband's venture company, which had been bullying and exploiting its subcontractors, went bankrupt, and she reluctantly started working in the sex industry. When her job was discovered by a client, she was blackmailed... The high-ranking CEO's wife was forced to perform 20 consecutive acts of sexual assault. "You know how badly your husband treated us, right!?" "We've been licking his shoes, so you're going to lick our dicks properly, okay?" Her body was seized, and the high-ranking young wife was played with as they pleased...!
response.title: The CEO's Wife Falls into Prostitution After eHr Cmpany Goes Bankrupt
